summary: Focused frontend re-test of Bharat Palace bug-fix iteration. All 7 requested items PASS: hero background renders immediately with visible interior photo, chip and h1 stack correctly with spacing, hero indicator switching works, event card image mapping is correct (Birthday->IMG_3951 jungle, Engagement->IMG_3954 purple, Anniversary->pexels 14395559, Baby Shower->pexels 32573161), and 0 broken images once page fully loaded. FABs present.
critical_code_review_comments: Initial page load reports 6 lazy-loaded pexels images as not yet complete (naturalWidth==0) until user scrolls. This is normal lazy-loading behavior; after networkidle all images load with 0 broken. Not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for hero image visibility, image swap between Birthday/Engagement cards, and Anniversary/Baby Shower image replacements are all verified working on https://palace-events-3.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified URLs: Birthday=5x8x8917_IMG_3951.jpg, Engagement=kknz0pvf_IMG_3954.jpg, Anniversary=pexels 14395559, Baby Shower=pexels 32573161.
